feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: My understanding (or misunderstanding?) of Kane Pixel's the Backrooms Movie by A24
entry.content: SPOILERS IF YOU HAVEN'T WATCHED IT 1. The Backrooms is an ecosystem dependant on the quantum observer effect but suffers from dementia 2. The Backrooms complex, is the entire complex, there is no levels, because every level is connected to the backrooms complex such as the Poolrooms Level 37, the library Level 601, Level 384 the red city / Level 11.3 The Red Light district from the youtube series and Level 188 from the first backrooms found footage video 3. The Backrooms specifically chooses to

entry.title: /o/ Auto: 2009+ MX-5 NC vs 2017+ Renault Twingo III GT
entry.content: Need a car that can be both fun and dailyable since I need it to get to work daily. I found these two to be at my price range, and I would like to ask for your personal /o/pinion. Twingo: +Great fuel ecenomy +Newer +Pretty reliable +Peppy rear engine rwd hatch +OK power to weight -Common electrical issues -A more basic driving experince and looks like basic traffic -0.9 is small displacement even though it's turbo 110hp NC: +Maximum style and vibe +160 hp with small weight +Sporty feel and real

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I'm honestly surprised by how many people got filtered by this game. There are s…
entry.content: I'm honestly surprised by how many people got filtered by this game. There are some persons out there that I thought had pretty good taste when it comes to consuming media, but they disregard TCOAAL as being nothing gooner filth just because of the touchy subject it has, even though the actual story of the game and the relationship between Andrew and Ashley is genuinely very compelling.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Kemono
entry.content: Where is the replacement?? Just vibe code it. Piracy is doing better than ever before, nobody cares about 'piracy bad' moral argument anymore and vibe coding went so far we get pirate streaming sites that look better than netflix and offer better content in better quality. Even denuvo games are getting cracked again with 2 methods. All this and nobody has done simple kemono replacement?

entry.title: /int/ International: What is the average New Yorker like?
entry.content: My mental image of a New Yorker is a gruff 3rd generation italian or polish American wearing a flat cap, smokes like a chimney while drinking coffee as black as tar, has a raspy voice and says "Ayy I'm walkin' ere, fuggeddabboutit" and works some blue collar job. Is that accurate?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Web Browsers
entry.content: >lust inducing image I'd like to talk about non-chromium browsers, since Zen finally crossed the line for me yesterday. I understand there's not much choice, however I'd like to hear other anons opinions and advice. >Vanilla Firefox Too bloated. If I see Pocket shilled one more time, I'll hurt someone. >Waterfox First contender. >LibreWolf Second contender. Cursory glance on the above and it seems Libre is more privacy focused oob and Water is more oriented towards customization? >Palemoon I nee

entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8382 Dinner Edition Previous Thread: >>83491895 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profiles, s

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /asdiq/ Archiving, storage tech, development, in-depth history/analysis, and questions general
entry.content: CURRENT EVENT: archive.today is owned by a jihadist or some shit. This is a general which is focused on archiving, but also interested in other related topics. Storage technology and file sharing: Hardware, software, services, shadow libraries, backups, home server, and networks such as tape drives, HDDs, file systems, archive.today, IPFS, Arweave, BitTorrent, etc. Development: E.g.: web archiving is much harder in 2026 compared to 2016. Too many websites are walled off by systems such as Cl0udf

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Would it ever, in the future, be possible to make a wagon that can lift up a con…
entry.content: Would it ever, in the future, be possible to make a wagon that can lift up a considerable amount (say 4-6 inches) for rough roads and water crossings, WITHOUT an air suspension (lifting steel springs?) because those tend to fail and be super expensive to replace and they overheat if used often and are very expensive. That is, will we ever have wagons that can convert from low wagons to high suvs at the press of a button, without costing a fortune and being available to normies for an avg car pri

entry.title: /b/ Random: I fantasies about taking the lives of bad or evil people in order to make the wo…
entry.content: I fantasies about taking the lives of bad or evil people in order to make the world a better place, and to better the human species. However i don't trust myself to draw the lines between good and evil. I'm aware that there are good people like caring and passionate people, and I'm aware that there are bad people who do bad things to other humans to better themselves. But what about the grey area? my purpose is to become an EMT and help the lives of as many people as i can.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Vintage Story
entry.content: >1.23 update >the team has decided that Combat should be a focus for the next big update. Here's what we want to look into: Tighter, more visceral hit detection; More varied attack animations; Possibly rework of armor- and weapon tiers; A few more types of weapons; and more! The combat changes will be in good hands - we have Maltiez, author of the mod Combat Overhaul, on our team to advise us, we abducted the infamous SaltyWater to help us with animations and conveniently we just received new co

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: the daily chaotic
entry.content: I'm leaving [s4s] for good I'm sick and tired of everybody ABUSING me all the time on this board. No, I am not making this announcement to stir up any drama, or to get people to talk about me fondly after I am gone. This is not a cry for attention. This is not a threat. There are many things that this thread is not, in fact I cannot think of a single thing that it is. I am simply leaving, and I thought you all should know. Your fortune: ｷﾀ━━━━━━(ﾟ∀ﾟ)━━━━━━ !!!!

The 20 millimeter throat clogging test will begin in 30 seconds. Line up at the tailpipe. The slidding speed starts slowly, but gets faster each minute after you hear this signal. [BRAAAP] A single loaf should be ingested each time you hear this sound. [PRRRT] Remember to succ in a straight line, and gag as long as possible. The second time you fail to complete a log be

entry.title: /b/ Random: I'm not a moralfaggot but just for a second consider this. As great as porn is i…
entry.content: I'm not a moralfaggot but just for a second consider this. As great as porn is it's bad for your brain chemistry to keep indulging in it constantly. Take breaks, just a couple days a week at least. Do your brain a favor and normalize your dopamine receptors. I'm addicted af to porn and I'm sick of it so I'm trying to fix my head. I'm only posting this because maybe you are too, who knows? Have a good night, bitches.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Transporting a Vehicle
entry.content: What is a good transporter in the lower 48? Hard mode: must have first or second had experience. The guy I used once before is now $2.75 a mile, but I am seeing companies online such as Road Runner Auto Transport willing to do it for like 75 cents a mile.. I don't know if those first popping up on good result companies are legit though.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: UV light for detecting leaks?
entry.content: Many of the u/v lights sold in auto parts stores are cheap low end dreck that seem to suck. Ai seems to suggest that Convoy S12 UV is the best affordable option. What is a good U/V light for detecting oil or a/c leaks on a car?

entry.title: /int/ International: I don't like cities.
entry.content: I listened to everyone saying how great European cities are, and visited most of the major ones over a couple trips, and yeah they are pretty for sure. Then I moved to NYC, and like yeah it's pretty impressive, but honestly I think I only moved to cities because I'm told they are good. I like being in nature, and having more space, and not having to cram into a bus or subway to get somewhere, and not having to pay huge rents. I think small towns, or suburbs with access to a city are the best pla
